title: vitis vinifera f. purpurea
intro: Vitis vinifera f. purpurea, also known as purple-leafed grapevine, is a variant of the grapevine plant that is characterized by its distinctive deep purple leaves. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitis vinifera f. purpurea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
